channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sony industry starmaker Clive Davis, who launched the careers of Janis Joplin and Whitney Houston, dead at 94
item.description: Clive Davis, who guided artists like Barry Manilow, Carrie Underwood, Kelly Clarkson, Carlos Santana, and Alicia Keys, has died at 94.

item.title: Meet the 2 men putting New Yorkâs $300 billion pension fund in play for the first time in 20 years
item.description: Two insurgent Democrats argue that New York's most powerful financial office has mismanaged funds and urge voters not to support the incumbent.

item.title: Nvidia says its new data center design will fix AIâs water problem
item.description: Nvidia claims its new liquid cooling design eliminates nearly all water usage in data centers.

item.title: Lessons for leaders from the Knicks' first championship in 53 years
item.description: Resilience is forged during losses, not victories.
